location.address:
**NEW LOCATION FOR 2026**

Lymm Rugby Club, Crouchley Lane, Lymm, WA13 0AT

food:
Hot food is served across both days — Friday 5pm–10pm and Saturday noon–10pm. We have a dedicated gluten-free fryer.

To order, head to the Lymm RFC Halfway House.

brews.name: Waller
brews.description: Pale and refreshing with distinctive hop character. A true thirst quencher.

brews.name: Altitude IPA
brews.description: Where East meets West. A crisp, juicy Mountain IPA with Simcoe and Strata bringing layers of dank pine and ripe strawberry, while Amarillo and Mosaic add bright notes of orange zest and tropical fruit. Intensely drinkable, a clean bitterness balances the juicy opening.

brews.name: Aestival IPA
brews.description: A vibrant Tropical IPA bursting with pineapple, mango and stone fruit from a magnificent seven of US and NZ hops. Juicy mango, guava and citrus lead the palate, carried by a full mouthfeel and finishing sweet and smooth.

brews.name: Otter's Pool
brews.description: A refreshing pale ale with a fragrant hop aroma; it's the perfect accompaniment to the summer season.

brews.name: I Want To Be Classified
brews.description: Both beers made with the exact same malt bill, mash temp, boil time, hop additions and yeast strain. Classified uses a chloride-sulphate ratio of 1:2 and whirlpool-hopped aroma addition. Two same recipes, brewed differently.

brews.name: I Want To Be Stereotyped
brews.description: Both beers made with the exact same malt bill, mash temp, boil time, hop additions and yeast strain. Stereotyped uses a chloride-sulphate ratio of 2:1 and a dip-hopped aroma addition. Two same recipes, brewed differently.

brews.name: Tiny Eyes
brews.description: Hazy pale with notes of blackberry and lime.

brews.name: The Punkiest Monkey That Ever Popped
brews.description: Our collab with the team at Dexter and Jones. A juicy hazy pale ale with lashings of Citra, Motueka and Krush with a sprinkling of Riwaka.

brews.name: Hickling Ghost
brews.description: A harmonious blend of tropical and citrus fruits with a well-balanced malt backbone. Creamy mouthfeel.

brews.name: There's An App For That
brews.description: A 3.8% pale ale pouring with a light haze and absolutely loaded with juicy tropical character. Expect waves of ripe mango, peach and pineapple on the nose, backed up by soft stone fruit sweetness and a bright, clean bitterness that keeps everything crisp and crushable.

brews.name: Quatre
brews.description: A light pale ale blending the best English malts with full-flavoured French hops. Mild bitterness, but lots of hop flavour and aroma, with red berry and citrus flavours shining through.

brews.name: Pint
brews.description: A 3.9% session ale brewed with an all pale malt bill and hopped with a blend of New Zealand and US hops. A burst of zesty aromas, uplifting grapefruit flavours and a subtle lemongrass finish.

brews.name: Pashmina Pale
brews.description: As delicate as its namesake, with Cashmere hops lending flavours of lemon, melon and lychee. Soft aromatics and smooth bitterness complement a gently herbal finish.

brews.name: El Dorado
brews.description: A juicy, easy-drinking pale ale showcasing El Dorado hops.

brews.name: Dream Grill
brews.description: A hazy, hop-forward pale ale packed with juicy fruit character.

brews.name: Kahuna
brews.description: A taste of summer. Clean and crisp on the palate, giving way to that familiar Mosaic flavour blended with passion fruit, leading the drinker on a thirst-quenching journey of tropical fruit and floral notes.

brews.name: The Beautiful North
brews.description: Old faithful Citra meets new hop Krush. A fruit bowl of flavours, bursting with fresh citrus, mango and peach!

brews.name: High Force
brews.description: A hoppy, hazy pale brewed using Citra and Strata; a soft, fluffy malt base with hypnotic fruit layers and a resinous bite.

brews.name: Rambler
brews.description: Plenty of crystal malt and Bramling Cross hops give this beer a subtle balance of malt and autumn-fruit hoppiness.

brews.name: Gold Leaf
brews.description: Golden bitter with old-fashioned English hops.

brews.name: Sir Philip
brews.description: Amber in colour, this premium bitter has a light malty overtone balanced with the classic pairing of Fuggles and Target hops.

brews.name: Darwin's Origin
brews.description: Rich, spicy and malty. Using ingredients from three continents, its zesty character descends into a long, lavish finish.

brews.name: Shropshire Gold
brews.description: Balanced and quaffable.

brews.name: Chocolate Cherry Mild
brews.description: All the class of Dunham Dark, with a dry hint of cherry that cuts through the beer.

brews.name: Single Hop IPA
brews.description: With a strength hidden beneath its smooth caramel notes, the layers of pungent whole-leaf hops show exactly what standalone hops can do.

brews.name: Sunset IPA
brews.description: An American-style IPA at an easy-drinking ABV. Chinook, Centennial, Columbus and Simcoe hops provide plenty of pine and resinous flavours with a fruity top note.

brews.name: Glass Tiles
brews.description: Citra, Mosaic and Simcoe.

brews.name: Opus
brews.description: A clean, hoppy blonde ale.

brews.name: Trixie
brews.description: An American blonde ale, light and hoppy.

brews.name: Lalochezia
brews.description: A golden ale, crisp and easy-drinking.

brews.name: Lazin' on a Sunny Afternoon
brews.description: Golden ale dry-hopped with Fuggles, East Kent Goldings and Bramling Cross. A quintessential summer session ale with notes of hedgerow berries, crisp biscuits and light lychee.

brews.name: Dead Moon
brews.description: A deeply smooth best bitter. Bitter-sweet burnt toffee and hints of marmalade on toast, with a resinous bitter finish that draws you back for more.

brews.name: Stout
brews.description: Dark, smooth and velvety with roasted malt flavours for a balanced, full-bodied experience. Clean finish with a touch of sweetness.

brews.name: Creme Bearlee
brews.description: A luscious, dark and sweet stout. Roasty notes from dark malts combine with the sweetness of molasses and Madagascan vanilla, the perfect entry-level stout.

brews.name: RedRun
brews.description: A hopped lager, crisp and refreshing.

brews.name: Ginger Beer
brews.description: A warming, spicy ginger beer.

brews.name: Fall Out the Sky
brews.description: Golden, with notes of toffee and a dried-fruit aroma followed by a classic, crisp, bitter finish.

brews.name: Never Known Fog Like It
brews.description: A New England pale ale hopped with Chinook, Citra, Mosaic and Simcoe, hand-selected from Yakima Chief.

brews.name: Steady Rolling Man
brews.description: Our pale ale. Incredibly soft and delicate with intense tropical fruit hop aromatics and saturation, this is our vision of the perfect pale ale.

brews.name: Sonoma
brews.description: A refreshing, sessionable, hazy pale ale hopped generously with Mosaic, Centennial and Citra. Resinous notes of sticky mandarin and grapefruit, finishing crisp and clean.

brews.name: Gem State of Mind
brews.description: Bronze medal winner at the World Beer Awards 2025. Hazy, juicy and packed with tropical character. Idaho #7 and Citra hops bring waves of mango, pineapple and citrus, with subtle pine and stone-fruit undertones.

brews.name: Lust For Life
brews.description: Our flagship beer that started it all. Double dry-hopped with Citra, Simcoe and Mosaic. Ripe, juicy mango, peach and pine with the perfect balance of flavour, bitterness and drinkability.

brews.name: Highway to Helles
brews.description: Bright golden colour with a frothy white head and cereal grain on the nose. Fresh and balanced with light malt, grassy floral hops and a touch of dry bitterness.

brews.name: Pina Colada
brews.description: Rum with a rich, evocative burst of pineapple and coconut, perfectly balanced with a lingering sweetness.

brews.name: Berry Lime Blitz
brews.description: Rich blackberry depth lifted by zesty lime, with a subtle flavour of rum for warmth. Lightly sparkling and smooth, with a refreshing, layered finish.

brews.name: Rhubarb & Strawberry
brews.description: A cider twist on a classic dessert: fresh rhubarb juice and sweet crushed strawberries blend exceptionally.

brews.name: Celtic Tiger
brews.description: Golden cider blended with the vibrant natural flavours of pineapple and orange; a refreshing balance of sweet and sour with pressed apple afternotes.

brews.name: Abrahalls AV Vintage
brews.description: Crafted from homegrown Dabinett, Yarlington Mill and Harry Masters cider apples. A finely balanced, smooth, sparkling golden drop with a delicate tease of tannins.

brews.name: Lily The Pink
brews.description: A medium fruity cider with a warm honey hue. Made using 100% cider apples, intensely fruity with candy-apple sweetness and a light body.

gins.name: Hepple
gins.description: Heavily awarded, Hepple is the ultimate modern gin, an intense yet elegant reinvention of a classic gin, elevated through our use of botanicals picked fresh from our home in Northumberland.

gins.name: Hills & Harbour Dry Gin
gins.description: With local Noble Fir needles and Bladderwrack Seaweed, it leads with juniper and is balanced with hints of forest fir, tropical fruit, citrus spice, tangy sherbet and a subtle scent of the shore.

gins.name: Hills and Harbour - Burnt Orange and Smoked Pineapple
gins.description: Using Hills & Harbour Gin as a base, this full-strength cocktail captures bold flavours through a meticulous multi-day process. Fresh fruit is hand-smoked, torched, macerated, pressed, and distilled in every batch. Combining multiple craft techniques and pure distillation, this labor-intensive approach achieves a truly special, intensely fresh flavor profile.

gins.name: Mermaid Zest Gin
gins.description: Infused grapefruit, island bergamot and wild-foraged coastal rosemary with the smooth yet complex taste of our award-winning Mermaid Gin. A blend of bright citrus and subtle sweetness combine for a zesty fresh spirit with a hint of sea air.

gins.name: Mermaid Gin
gins.description: Mermaid Gin delivers a smooth yet complex blend of fresh organic lemon zest and peppery grains of paradise, with a hint of sea air from wild-foraged, fragrant rock samphire. A refreshing and invigorating serve, for the free-spirited.

gins.name: Mermaid Pink Gin
gins.description: Steeped for four days with fresh Isle of Wight strawberries, Mermaid Pink Gin combines smooth, complex botanicals with rock samphire's hint of sea air. This contemporary pink gin features an aromatic strawberry, citrus, and juniper nose, leading to a vibrant berry taste with warm spice and a long, layered finish.

gins.name: Forest Gin
gins.description: The only gin to win 2 double-gold medals at the San Francisco World Spirit Awards in the same year. Selected as one of the Worlds Best 50 Gins. Distilled in the heart of the Macclesfield Forest in batches of 85 bottles at a time, each bottle containing only the finest botanicals and spring water.

gins.name: Forest Gin - Earl Grey
gins.description: Hand-ground forest botanicals—including bilberry, raspberry, moss, and pine—are distilled once in a 30-litre pot still alongside organic juniper and spices. Blended with local spring water and Quinteassential Earl Grey Tea, the resulting Forest Gin delivers earthy, herbal flavours complemented by sumptuous notes of oolong, cornflowers, and Sicilian bergamot.

gins.name: California White Grapefruit
gins.description: ** World Gin Awards 2025 Winner ** Made with organic California grapefruit, fresh basil and ginger root, offering a delightful symphony of flavors perfect for any occasion. From the first sip, the vibrant citrus notes of grapefruit take center stage, providing a refreshing and invigorating taste.

gins.name: Boe Superior gin
gins.description: Boe Superior Gin takes its name from Franz de la Boe who first created Gin in 1658, and designed it as a medicine not as the tasty treat we know it as today! This new Superior edition is bottled at 41.5% and holds Refreshing Citrus and Orange notes with hints of Crisp Spicy Juniper and Cardamom!

gins.name: Wild Strawberry and Hibiscus
gins.description: **WINNER OF BEST WELSH FLAVOURED GIN AT THE WORLD GIN AWARDS 2023 AND 2024**Our beautiful pink gin, bursting with wild strawberries and hibiscus flower, is a luscious twist on our classic award-winning Welsh dry gin.

gins.name: Black - Cherry, muscat and Berry
gins.description: Hensol Black. Quite simply, Hensol Dry, flavoured with the highest quality black cherries, black berries and our hand foraged black muscat grapes from our botanical garden of Hensol Castle.

gins.name: Rhubarb
gins.description: Vibrant with the tangy taste of rhubarb accompanied by heady notes of juniper with a hint of citrus followed by fragrant elderflower and a whisper of warm ginger spice.

gins.name: Aromatic Spiced
gins.description: Embark on a flavour journey with this juniper-led Aromatic Spiced Gin, where warm woody sweetness meets cassia, cubebs, and sweet orange. A light citrus essence pairs with juicy mellowness, while cardamom pods introduce a delicate hint of ginger spice. Sip and discover a perfectly balanced, elevated gin experience.

gins.name: Apple and Honey
gins.description: Crafted with care, our Limited Edition Apple & Honey Gin is a vibrant celebration of spring. Distilled with crisp apples, delicate rose, hibiscus, and the rich sweetness of Hilltop Blossom Honey, it delivers a beautifully balanced flavour. The warmth of juniper shines through, complemented by soft floral notes and a fresh, uplifting finish.

gins.name: Capesthorne - Rhubarb and Lavendar
gins.description: Lovingly hand-crafted in Cheshire, this intriguing yet tried and test combination of flavours epitomises all things British, with floral notes combined with the tart yet sweet taste of the rhubarb makes for a distinctive and moreish gin experience.

gins.name: Wild Atlantic - wild strawberry and elderflower
gins.description: Awarded Best Irish Flavoured Gin at the World Gin Awards 2025, this sophisticated spirit is a luscious twist on Wild Atlantic Irish Gin. Master-distilled in small batches from eight traditional botanicals, it is infused with wild strawberries and elderflower to deliver a vibrant, bursting fruit flavor.

gins.name: Bison Grass
gins.description: The World’s First Bison Grass Gin. Aromas of freshly cut summer hay, taste of lemongrass and subtle spice. Further Awards – Double Gold Medal Winner

gins.name: Passion Fruit
gins.description: Distilled with Juniper and sweet orange peel in the pot, with freshly sliced passion fruits in the botanical basket, so the vapour travels through the fruit, picking up the flavour. Pure organic passion fruit juice is blended into the gin to add even more delicious and natural flavour.

gins.name: Rhubarb
gins.description: Searching for a gin that is both elegant and full of flavour? Our Rhubarb gin is distilled using 8 different botanicals including juniper, rhubarb, cassia and vanilla giving it an intensely fruity palate with a deliciously dry finish

gins.name: Blood Orange & Apricot
gins.description: Awarded a 2023 Global Gin Masters Gold Medal, this gin offers a unique pairing of zesty Italian citrus and soft French apricot. It features bright orange on the nose, an exotic flavour profile, and a refreshing finish.

gins.name: Wild Strawberry & Basil
gins.description: This limited-edition seasonal gin is made with organic wild strawberries. It delivers fresh strawberry and floral notes, complemented by a faint hint of basil and black pepper.

gins.name: Apple Crumble (50ml mini Gin)
gins.description: Our multi award-winning Apple Crumble Gin offers tasting notes of juniper, baked apple, cinnamon and rich toasted oats as a perfect gin paired with lighter drinks in summer or warming recipes in the colder months.

gins.name: Raspberry (50ml mini Gin)
gins.description: Gold Medal Winner 2022 Global Gin Masters. Intensely ripe fruit-led gin distilled with 24 botanicals and cask rested. Tasting notes feature juniper, fresh raspberry, black peppercorns, concluding with a savoury finish. Awards – Bronze Medal IWSC 2020, Bronze medal world gin awards 2021.

gins.name: Caorunn Raspberry
gins.description: Handcrafted in small batches, Caorunn Scottish Raspberry Gin infuses Perthshire raspberries using a unique Copper Berry Chamber. The nose delivers a fruity aroma of raspberry and soft vanilla. On the palate, vibrant raspberry and tart rowanberry notes lead into a pleasantly clean and fresh finish.

gins.name: Tarsier Khao San Gin
gins.description: Inspired by Bangkok’s vibrant backpacking hub, Khao San Gin captures the street's energy. Tarsier cold-distills fresh kaffir lime leaf, lemongrass, and Thai red chilli separately in a vacuum still to harness authentic Thai cuisine flavours. This vibrant extract is then expertly blended with a traditional distillate of ten carefully selected botanicals.

gins.name: Sipsmith FreeGlider
gins.description: Crafting great alcohol-free spirits requires extraordinary skill, patience, and determination. Sipsmith FreeGlider is no exception. The team spent two years experimenting with 189 prototypes and over 100 ingredients to perfect this ultimate alcohol-free spirit, refusing to compromise on quality or flavour to ensure the finest possible liquid.

gins.name: Tanqueray Flor de Sevilla 0%
gins.description: Tanqueray Flor de Sevilla 0.0% Alcohol-Free is a zesty, fruity spirit, offering a bold and bittersweet taste of the sun-soaked Mediterraneans in a new non-alcoholic version. Discover the definitive experience from Tanqueray, just without the alcohol.

gins.name: Wild Raspberry liqueur
gins.description: Intensely fruity, perfect served over ice as an aperitif or in a cocktail.

gins.name: Orange Marmalade
gins.description: A refined balance of sweet and bitter orange flavours, with the pine flavour of juniper: a citrus hit with warming aftertaste to tickle your taste buds.

gins.name: Rhubarb and Ginger liqueur
gins.description: Inspired by the warming, homely flavours of rhubarb and ginger crumble, a classic taste that brings back fond memories of Sunday dinners and family gatherings.

gins.name: Drumshanbo Gunpowder Tea
gins.description: Slow distilled by hand in copper pot stills. This gin combines the 8 pot still and 4 vapour infused botanicals collected from China with fresh citrus and Chinese gunpowder tea.

gins.name: Lemon
gins.description: A balanced London Dry. This time loaded loaded with lemons and zest of lemons. Super fresh taste, fantastic colour.

gins.name: Lychee
gins.description: This exotic gin pairs crisp juniper with the sweet, tropical essence of fresh lychee. Delicately floral and intensely aromatic, it delivers a refreshing citrus undertone and a smooth, juicy finish.

gins.name: Butterfly Pea flower
gins.description: Bright citrus, soothing lavender and a magical shift from deep indigo to vibrant pink when mixed with tonic.

gins.name: Elderflower
gins.description: Crisp juniper meets the delicate, floral sweetness of handpicked elderflower in this elegant gin. Bright citrus undertones and a hint of warming spice deliver a smooth, refreshingly light finish.

gins.name: Redcurrant
gins.description: Distilled with tart locally grown redcurrants. Fresh hedge row in summer vibes.

gins.name: Hopped
gins.description: Loud, bold and dangerously smooth. Distilled with Cascade & Citra hops. Citrusy, resinous, fruity.

gins.name: Portobello Road Savoury Gin
gins.description: Joining the classic set of botanicals that we use for Portobello Road London Dry Gin, we also add bergamont, rosemary, basil and green olive, and we add just a tiny pinch of sea salt after distillation to give it that slight hint of coastal air.

gins.name: Dunshambo Sardinia Citrus
gins.description: Hand-distilled in medieval copper pots, this refreshing Drumshanbo Gunpowder Irish Gin combines twelve signature botanicals from the Orient with the rare, exotic Citrus monstruosa. Found only in Sardinia, this unique citrus adds a fresh, vibrant twist to the classic spirit.

gins.name: Seaside London Dry
gins.description: Capturing the wonder of the Scottish shoreline, Edinburgh Gin Seaside is a softly sweet, mineralistic spirit crafted from foraged beach botanicals. Reminiscent of a bracing coastal walk, it is best served over ice with tonic, grapefruit, and thyme.

gins.name: The Botannist Islay Dry Gin
gins.description: A progressive exploration of Islay's heritage, The Botanist layers 22 hand-foraged local botanicals with nine classic berries, barks, and peels. Achingly slow distillation creates the first Islay dry gin—a rare, complex expression of a remote Scottish island’s soul.

main.name: Beechwood Industries, Primrose Hill Nurseries and Tipis at primrose Hill Nurseries

about:
The Lymm Beer Festival was the brainchild of the Lymm and District Round Table member Chris Stephens. Started in 2011, the Lymm Beer Fest has quickly established itself as a firm favourite with local people and has become one of the three main annual charity events organised by Lymm and District Round Table in order to raise money for local charities and community groups. The other events are the Lymm Charity Duck Race and the Big Lymm Fireworks.

The event will offer many carefully selected real ales, ciders and perries. Lymm Ladies will also be serving a fantastic selection of gins. There will be live music involving a host of talented local bands and singers, and a selection of food to purchase, with all profits going to charity. For those abstaining or driving we will also be offering free soft drinks.
